data.title: AerCap Holdings N.V. Announces Filing of Interim Financial Report for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: On April 29, 2026, AerCap Holdings N.V. (NYSE: AER) disclosed the submission of its interim financial report for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The report includes unaudited condensed consolidated financial statements and accompanying notes. This announcement came from AerCap, a leading company in the aviation industry, based in Dublin.

data.title: Re:Cognition Health Achieves Global Clinical Site Assessment Recertification at its U.S. Clinics
data.description: In Fairfax, Virginia on April 29, 2026, Re:Cognition Health, a renowned company specializing in innovative Alzheimer's Disease treatments, has confirmed the successful renewal of its Global Clinical Site Assessment (GCSA) Site Certification. This recognition, bestowed by the International Accrediting organization, signifies the company's continued dedication to excellence in conducting clinical trials worldwide.

data.title: Bardstown Bourbon Company Turns Any Bottle into a Personalized Gifting Experience
data.description: In Bardstown, Kentucky, Bardstown Bourbon has implemented NFC gift tags for consumers to personalize gifts with custom messages, photos, or videos. This technology enables recipients to access the attached content directly with the gift, enhancing the gifting experience.

data.title: Alexander’s Declares Quarterly $4.50 Dividend on Common Shares
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Alexander’s, Inc. (NYSE: ALX) made public its latest declaration regarding dividends. The company's Board of Directors confirmed a standard quarterly dividend amounting to $4.50 per share. This dividend is scheduled for payment on May 29, 2026, to shareholders recorded on May 11, 2026.

data.title: GRAINGER INCREASES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND BY 10%
data.description: Today, W.W. Grainger, Inc. (NYSE: GWW) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $2.49 per share, signifying a 10% rise from the previous dividend. This dividend will be paid on June 1, 2026, to shareholders...

data.title: Industry Leaders in Fixed-Income Analytics, Kelli Sayres and Gene Park, join Andrew Davidson & Co., Inc.
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in New York, Andrew Davidson & Co., Inc. (AD&Co), a top provider of analytical intelligence solutions for investors in residential loans and mortgage-backed securities, revealed that Kelli Sayres and Gene Park, ex-Managing Partners, will be joining the company. Established as leaders in the industry, AD&Co continues to enhance its services with this strategic move.

data.title: Global Light Therapy Market Size Will Reach $802.7 Million by 2031, Growing at a CAGR of 4.4% -- Allied Market Research
data.description: The increasing prevalence of epidermis disorders, seasonal affective disorder (SAD), and the demand for non-invasive phototherapy solutions have been driving the global light therapy market. According to a study by Allied Market Research, as of April 29, 2026, the market is experiencing significant growth. Key factors contributing to this growth include a rise in the use of light therapy for various skin conditions, SAD, and the popularity of non-invasive phototherapy solutions. The market is projected to reach substantial figures, with researchers indicating a strong upward trend in the adoption of light therapy worldwide.

data.title: Keller Williams Acquires Michael Lewis Marketing Suite
data.description: Austin, Texas-based real estate firm Keller Williams (KW) has recently completed the acquisition of Michael Lewis Marketing Suite (MLMS), an established marketing services company. The move is aimed at enhancing KW's marketing capabilities and expanding its reach in the industry. No specific financial details were disclosed regarding the acquisition.

data.title: Casca Selected by Celtic Bank to Power Its SBA Lending Program
data.description: Today in San Francisco, it was announced that Celtic Bank, a leading lender in the U.S. Small Business Administration (SBA) 7(a) program since 2013, has formed a partnership with Casca's AI-native platform. This collaboration is aimed at speeding up the process of originating commercial loans and expanding Celtic Bank's SBA 7(a) portfolio. Celtic Bank is highly regarded as one of the top SBA lenders in the country, and through this partnership, they seek to enhance their capabilities in this sector. The SBA 7(a) program has been integral to Celtic Bank's success in the lending industry, and this strategic move underscores their commitment to growth and innovation within this space.

data.title: MikMak, a SPINS Company, Launches MikMak 4.0: The Industry's Leading Real-Time Commerce Intelligence and Orchestration Platform
data.description: In an announcement made in Chicago on April 29, 2026, MikMak, now a part of SPINS Company, revealed the newest version of its platform. This update empowers brands to maximize the efficiency of each marketing dollar utilized throughout their entire range of technology tools and partner network. MikMak, recognized as the top global commerce intelligence platform, showcased how this development will revolutionize the way companies manage their resources effectively.
